# Fixture — missing Success Criteria

## Summary

Minimal brainstorm fixture missing Success Criteria for spec-rigor negative case.

## Problem Frame

Gate should reject absent Success Criteria heading.

## Key Decisions

- **D1** Use a minimal fixture doc instead of the full exemplar.

## Requirements

- **R1** The gate must fail when Success Criteria is absent.

## Scope Boundaries

- Non-goals: full exemplar coverage in negative fixture.

## Open Questions

- none
